meaning: vt.关在笼中,把...关起来,禁闭
examples: Shortly before I started painting in March, I found that the new joints were still too long because the skirt armors could not properly encage the hip as shown in the third photo.
The group of the sociable has more opportunities to encage in social interactions with others whereas those in the groups of the sociable and the outdoors have less social activities.
